audit_input.task_goal: make the one-legged hopper move forward while staying upright and controlled

audit_output.reason: The high 'alive_bonus' combined with zero weight on 'healthy_pose' and 'energy_cost' strongly incentivizes the agent to survive and move forward, but not necessarily to do so in an upright or controlled manner as specified by the task goal. This often leads to the agent falling over and sliding, or using excessive, uncontrolled movements to achieve forward velocity while merely surviving.
